word: G1998 - ἐπισυντρέχω - episyntréchō - ep-ee-soon-trekh'-o - Come running together

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπισυντρέχω

- Transliteration: Episuntrecho

- Phonetic: ep-ee-soon-trekh'-o

- Definition:

1. to run together besides

a. to others already gathered

- Origin: from G1909 and G4936

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G4936; to hasten together upon one place (or a particular occasion): - come running together.
